description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden fixed stock and foregrip, paired with a black metal receiver and barrel. The weapon is equipped with a distinctive round drum magazine, which is prominent beneath the receiver. The foregrip and pistol grip are both made of wood, providing ergonomic handling. The barrel is relatively long and slender, ending in a simple muzzle with no visible attachments. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the receiver and barrel for aiming. The overall appearance suggests a robust, utilitarian firearm with a blend of wood and metal construction.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden stock and grips, black metal receiver, and a round drum magazine beneath the barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden stock, foregrip, pistol grip, and the round drum magazine clearly.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular drum magazine and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the wooden stock and the metal barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wooden stock and the back of the drum magazine.
